zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel Gifford於1420年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，她的父親Henry Gifford31歲，母親Maude Haydock22歲。她於1440年與John Lord of Haslington Vernon在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1470年在英國英格蘭爾哈斯林頓享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel Gifford于1420年出生在英国英格兰爾时，她的父亲Henry Gifford31岁，母亲Maude Haydock22岁。她于1440年与John Lord of Haslington Vernon在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1470年在英国英格兰爾哈斯林頓享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel Gifford was born in 1420, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Gifford, was 31 and her mother, Maude Haydock, was 22. She married John Lord of Haslington Vernon in 1440, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1470, in Haslington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel Gifford est née en 1420, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Gifford, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Maude Haydock, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Lord of Haslington Vernon en 1440, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1470, à Haslington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel Gifford 1420 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Gifford 31 und ihre Mutter Maude Haydock 22. Sie hat 1440 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom John Lord of Haslington Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1470 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Haslington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel Gifford è nata il nel 1420 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Gifford, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Maude Haydock, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Lord of Haslington Vernon nel 1440, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1470, nel Haslington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel Gifford(이)가 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Gifford(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude Haydock(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 John Lord of Haslington Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 하슬링턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel Gifford родилась в 1420 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Gifford было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maude Haydock, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Lord of Haslington Vernon в 1440 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1470 г. в местности хаслингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
